use_cases: Primary call-to-action button with customizable glow effect for tech products
Brand-colored interactive buttons with hover animations for SaaS applications
Attention-grabbing CTAs with sliding glow bar for landing pages
Customizable accent buttons with glass-morphism styling for dashboards
Dark-mode friendly glowing buttons for crypto and Web3 interfaces
ai_summary: A customizable glowing button component featuring glass-morphism styling with gradient overlays and color-tinted glow effects. The button transitions smoothly between foreground and muted states on hover, with a dynamic glow bar that slides in from the right edge. Accepts glowColor prop for brand customization and uses pseudo-elements for the layered glow animation.
